title: Admin Login and Authentication
description: Verify admin can successfully log in and access admin dashboard

steps.description: Navigate to sign-in page (/sign-in)
Wait for Clerk sign-in form to load (look for email input field)
Fill in email input field with admin email from environment variable TEST_ADMIN_EMAIL (required for admin tests)
Fill in password input field with admin password from environment variable TEST_ADMIN_PASSWORD (required for admin tests)
Click sign-in button or submit form
Verify successful login (redirected away from /sign-in page, admin menu visible)
Verify admin dashboard is accessible (URL contains /admin or redirected to /admin)

title: Admin Home Page Navigation
description: Verify admin home page loads and all navigation buttons are accessible

steps.description: Navigate to admin home page (/admin)
Verify page loads without errors (HTTP 200, no console errors)
Verify admin navigation buttons grid is visible (Admin Home, Manage Users, Manage Events, etc.)
Click on 'Manage Users' button
Verify navigation to /admin/manage-usage page is successful
Navigate back to admin home page (/admin)
Click on 'Manage Events' button
Verify navigation to /admin/manage-events page is successful

title: Manage Users Page - List and Display
description: Verify manage users page displays user list with proper data

steps.description: Navigate to manage users page (/admin/manage-usage)
Verify page loads without errors
Verify page title or header indicates user management
Verify user list table or grid is visible (may be empty)
Verify table headers or column labels are visible (Name, Email, Role, Status, etc.)
Verify pagination controls are visible (if users exist)

title: Manage Users - Search and Filter
description: Verify search and filter functionality works on manage users page

steps.description: Navigate to manage users page (/admin/manage-usage)
Wait for user list to load
Verify search input field is visible (if present)
Type in search field (if present) to test search functionality
Verify filter options or dropdowns are visible (if present)
Clear search field (if modified)

title: Manage Users - Edit User Role
description: Verify edit user functionality opens modal/form correctly

steps.description: Navigate to manage users page (/admin/manage-usage)
Wait for user list to load
Click on 'Edit' button for the first user in the list (if users exist)
Verify edit modal or form opens (if users exist)
Verify form fields are visible (Role dropdown, Status, etc.)
Close edit modal without saving (click Cancel or X button)

title: Manage Events Page - List and Display
description: Verify manage events page displays event list with proper data

steps.description: Navigate to manage events page (/admin/manage-events)
Verify page loads without errors
Verify page title or header indicates event management
Verify events list or grid is visible (may be empty)
Verify event cards or table rows display event information (title, date, location, etc.)
Verify pagination controls are visible (if events exist)

title: Manage Events - Future/Past Toggle
description: Verify future/past events toggle switch works correctly

steps.description: Navigate to manage events page (/admin/manage-events)
Wait for events list to load
Verify toggle switch is visible (Future Events / Past Events)
Click on toggle switch to switch between Future and Past events
Verify events list updates based on toggle selection
Switch toggle back to original state

title: Manage Events - Navigate to Event Details
description: Verify clicking on event navigates to event details page

steps.description: Navigate to manage events page (/admin/manage-events)
Wait for events list to load
Click on the first available event card or row (if events exist)
Verify navigation to event details page (/admin/events/[id])
Verify event details page loads without errors
Verify event information is displayed (title, date, description, etc.)

title: Event Details - Navigation Buttons
description: Verify event details page has navigation buttons for sub-pages

steps.description: Navigate to an event details page (/admin/events/[id]) - use first available event
Verify page loads without errors
Verify navigation button group is visible (Tickets, Ticket Types, Media, etc.)
Click on 'Tickets' button (if present)
Verify navigation to tickets list page (/admin/events/[id]/tickets/list)
Navigate back to event details page
Click on 'Media' button (if present)
Verify navigation to media list page (/admin/events/[id]/media/list)

title: Event Tickets List - Display and Pagination
description: Verify event tickets list page displays tickets with pagination

steps.description: Navigate to an event tickets list page (/admin/events/[id]/tickets/list) - use first available event
Verify page loads without errors
Verify tickets list or table is visible (may be empty)
Verify ticket information columns are visible (Ticket Type, Buyer, Status, etc.)
Verify pagination controls are visible (if tickets exist)
Click 'Next' button on pagination (if available and not disabled)
Verify page number updates and tickets list refreshes

title: Event Media List - Display and Actions
description: Verify event media list page displays media with edit/delete actions

steps.description: Navigate to an event media list page (/admin/events/[id]/media/list) - use first available event
Verify page loads without errors
Verify media grid or list is visible (may be empty)
Verify media items display thumbnails or preview images
Verify Edit and Delete buttons are visible on media items (if media exists)
Click on Edit button for first media item (if media exists)
Verify edit modal or form opens (if media exists)
Close edit modal without saving

title: Media Management Page - Grid Display
description: Verify media management page displays media grid with proper styling

steps.description: Navigate to media management page (/admin/media)
Verify page loads without errors
Verify media grid container is visible with gradient background
Verify media cards are displayed in grid layout (may be empty)
Verify each media card shows thumbnail, title, and action buttons
Verify pagination controls are visible (if media exists)

title: Media Management - Edit Media Modal
description: Verify edit media modal opens and displays form correctly

steps.description: Navigate to media management page (/admin/media)
Wait for media grid to load
Click on Edit button for first media item (if media exists)
Verify edit modal opens (if media exists)
Verify modal title indicates editing media
Verify form fields are visible (Title, Description, File URL, etc.)
Close modal without saving (click Cancel or X button)

title: Poll Management - List and Create
description: Verify poll management page displays polls and create button works

steps.description: Navigate to poll management page (/admin/polls)
Verify page loads without errors
Verify polls list or table is visible (may be empty)
Verify 'Create Poll' or 'Add Poll' button is visible
Click on 'Create Poll' button
Verify create poll modal or form opens
Verify form fields are visible (Question, Options, etc.)
Close create modal without saving

title: Membership Plans - List Display
description: Verify membership plans page displays plans list correctly

steps.description: Navigate to membership plans page (/admin/membership/plans)
Verify page loads without errors
Verify membership plans list or table is visible (may be empty)
Verify plan information columns are visible (Name, Price, Duration, etc.)
Verify 'Create Plan' or 'Add Plan' button is visible (if present)

title: Membership Subscriptions - List and Filter
description: Verify membership subscriptions page displays subscriptions with filtering

steps.description: Navigate to membership subscriptions page (/admin/membership/subscriptions)
Verify page loads without errors
Verify subscriptions list or table is visible (may be empty)
Verify subscription information columns are visible (User, Plan, Status, Start Date, etc.)
Verify filter options or search field is visible (if present)
Verify pagination controls are visible (if subscriptions exist)

title: Executive Committee - List and Actions
description: Verify executive committee page displays team members with edit/delete actions

steps.description: Navigate to executive committee page (/admin/executive-committee)
Verify page loads without errors
Verify team members list or grid is visible (may be empty)
Verify member information is displayed (Name, Role, Photo, etc.)
Verify 'Add Member' or 'Create' button is visible
Verify Edit and Delete buttons are visible on member items (if members exist)

title: Executive Committee - Create Member Modal
description: Verify create member modal opens and displays form correctly

steps.description: Navigate to executive committee page (/admin/executive-committee)
Click on 'Add Member' or 'Create' button
Verify create member modal or form opens
Verify form fields are visible (Name, Role, Email, Photo, Priority Order, etc.)
Verify 'Is Active' checkbox or toggle is visible
Close modal without saving

title: Event Sponsors - List and Create
description: Verify event sponsors page displays sponsors and create functionality

steps.description: Navigate to event sponsors page (/admin/event-sponsors)
Verify page loads without errors
Verify sponsors list or grid is visible (may be empty)
Verify sponsor information is displayed (Name, Company, Logo, etc.)
Verify 'Add Sponsor' or 'Create' button is visible
Click on 'Add Sponsor' button
Verify create sponsor modal or form opens
Verify form fields are visible (Name, Company, Contact Info, Logo URL, etc.)
Close modal without saving

title: Tenant Organizations - List Display
description: Verify tenant organizations page displays organizations list

steps.description: Navigate to tenant organizations page (/admin/tenant-management/organizations)
Verify page loads without errors
Verify organizations list or table is visible (may be empty)
Verify organization information columns are visible (Name, Tenant ID, etc.)
Verify action buttons are visible (View, Edit, etc.)

title: Tenant Settings - List and View
description: Verify tenant settings page displays settings list and view functionality

steps.description: Navigate to tenant settings page (/admin/tenant-management/settings)
Verify page loads without errors
Verify settings list or table is visible (may be empty)
Verify settings information columns are visible (Key, Value, Description, etc.)
Click on 'View' button for first setting (if settings exist)
Verify view details page or modal opens (if settings exist)
Navigate back to settings list

title: Bulk Email - Page Load and Interface
description: Verify bulk email page loads and displays email interface

steps.description: Navigate to bulk email page (/admin/bulk-email)
Verify page loads without errors
Verify bulk email interface is visible
Verify email composition form or interface elements are visible

title: Test Stripe - Page Load
description: Verify test Stripe page loads and displays payment testing interface

steps.description: Navigate to test Stripe page (/admin/test-stripe)
Verify page loads without errors
Verify Stripe test interface is visible
Verify payment form or test buttons are visible

title: Event Analytics Dashboard - Display
description: Verify event analytics dashboard displays charts and statistics

steps.description: Navigate to event analytics dashboard (/admin/events/dashboard)
Verify page loads without errors
Verify analytics dashboard content is visible
Verify charts, graphs, or statistics are displayed (if data exists)
Verify date range filters or event selector is visible (if present)

title: Event Registrations - List and Details
description: Verify event registrations page displays registrations with details

steps.description: Navigate to event registrations page (/admin/events/registrations)
Verify page loads without errors
Verify registrations list or table is visible (may be empty)
Verify registration information columns are visible (Event, Attendee, Ticket Type, Status, etc.)
Verify filter options or search field is visible (if present)
Verify pagination controls are visible (if registrations exist)

title: Global Contacts - List and Create
description: Verify global contacts page displays contacts and create functionality

steps.description: Navigate to global contacts page (/admin/event-contacts)
Verify page loads without errors
Verify contacts list or table is visible (may be empty)
Verify contact information columns are visible (Name, Phone, Email, Event, etc.)
Verify 'Add Contact' or 'Create' button is visible
Click on 'Add Contact' button
Verify create contact modal or form opens
Verify form fields are visible (Name, Phone, Email, Event, etc.)
Close modal without saving

title: Global Performers - List Display
description: Verify global performers page displays performers list

steps.description: Navigate to global performers page (/admin/event-featured-performers)
Verify page loads without errors
Verify performers list or grid is visible (may be empty)
Verify performer information is displayed (Name, Bio, Photo, etc.)
Verify action buttons are visible (Edit, Delete, etc.)

title: Admin Navigation - All Pages Accessible
description: Verify all admin navigation buttons lead to correct pages

steps.description: Navigate to admin home page (/admin)
Verify all navigation buttons are visible

Click on each navigation button and verify correct page loads: Admin Home, Manage Users, Manage Events, Event Analytics, Registrations, Poll Management, Focus Groups, Membership Plans, Membership Subscriptions, Bulk Email, Test Stripe, Media Management, Executive Committee, Event Sponsors, Organizations, Tenant Settings
Verify each page loads without errors (HTTP 200, no console errors)
Verify each page displays appropriate content for its function
